title: Update documentation for same-feature-tree conflict scope
description: Check CLAUDE.md for any description of the file-scope conflict behaviour (search for 'expected_files', 'expected_globs', 'conflict', '_beads_conflict'). The current CLAUDE.md entry under Conventions reads: 'File-scope conflicts are checked statically at schedule time. Overlapping expected_files/expected_globs between in-progress beads cause blocking.' Update this sentence to clarify the scope is within the same feature tree, e.g. 'Overlapping expected_files/expected_globs between in-progress beads in the same feature tree cause blocking.' Make no other changes.
acceptance_criteria: CLAUDE.md is updated so the file-scope conflict description states the check is scoped to the same feature tree
No other documentation files are created or modified
The change is a single sentence update, not a broader rewrite
